title: Our Mission
subtitle: Empowering Ukrainians in Norway to thrive through community, culture, and connection
inspireDesc:
We inspire Ukrainians in Norway to embrace
their heritage while building a new life, fostering confidence and cultural pride.
supportDesc:
From language learning to legal guidance, we
provide comprehensive support for every step of the integration journey.
connectDesc:
We create meaningful connections between
Ukrainian families, Norwegian communities, and professional networks.
shapeDesc: Through education and mentorship, we prepare Ukrainian families to thrive and contribute to Norwegian society.
narrativeTitle: Why we do what we do
narrativeDesc: Every year, MriJa helps hundreds of newcomers find their footing in their new home country, while simultaneously sending critical supplies back to Ukraine. Our goal is that no one should feel alone.

history.title: Our History
history.p1: MriJa was born out of a deep love for Ukraine and an unwavering belief in freedom. Our name means "Dream" in Ukrainian, and it represents the hope we carry together with the Norwegian people for a peaceful future.
history.p2: What started as a small group of volunteers in Norway wanting to make a difference has grown into a robust organization building bridges between our two countries through humanitarian aid, cultural exchange, and political engagement.

m1.title: The Beginning
m1.desc: The first seeds were sown during the Revolution of Dignity. We started with the collection of necessary equipment.

m2.title: Mobilization
m2.desc: When the invasion hit, we multiplied our efforts. Norway became a hub for logistics and support.

m3.title: A Living Dream
m3.desc: We now run extensive aid programs and serve as a voice for Ukraine in Norwegian society.

history.quote: Together, we keep the dream of a free Ukraine alive.
